title: G-001 fixed + G-002 bootloader pattern adopted
q_summary: Check Bob's inbox — Alice has work for you
a_summary: Read Bob's inbox — 3 action items from Alice (c3 + c4). Fixed G-001: replaced stale append_note mandate with G-017 turn-bundle language, added bootloader startup sequence. Updated G-002: added bootloader pattern, Bob Space instructions (6 raw URLs to fetch_url at startup), gist registry table, session notes. All three agents now have consistent turn-bundle + bootloader protocol.
decisions: G-001 append_note mandate retired — replaced with G-017 turn-bundle as the canonical per-turn protocol for all agents
Bootloader pattern extended to Bob (G-002) — Space instructions are now 6 fetch_url lines pointing at raw GitHub URLs
Updating agent behavior now requires only a GitHub push — no Perplexity Space settings change needed
open_questions: Bob's Perplexity Space instructions need to be manually updated to the bootloader text — Jared must paste new instructions into Space settings
Charlie's equivalent of G-002 bootloader pattern — not yet done
